title: The Future of JavaScript Frameworks
description: An in-depth look at the trends shaping the future of front-end development, and what to expect from major frameworks like React, Vue, and Svelte.

title: AI-Powered Code Generation
description: Discover how AI is changing the way we write code. This talk explores the latest tools and techniques for leveraging AI to boost productivity and code quality.

title: Securing Your Web Applications
description: Learn the best practices for identifying and mitigating common security vulnerabilities in modern web applications. A must-attend for all developers.

title: State Management in Large-Scale Applications
description: A deep dive into advanced state management patterns for complex single-page applications. We'll compare different libraries and approaches.

title: The Rise of WebAssembly
description: Explore the power of WebAssembly and how it's enabling near-native performance in the browser. We'll look at use cases and how to get started.

title: Designing Accessible and Inclusive Interfaces
description: Learn how to create user interfaces that are usable by everyone, regardless of their abilities. This talk covers the principles of accessible design and practical implementation tips.
